data.body: claim IN-PROCESS (pending full-suite green + commit): added claim_compute + claim_cli to rebar._commands.transition (lifecycle wrappers module) over txn.claim_core. Reproduces _emit_error_envelope (ticket_not_found/concurrency_conflict/claim_failed) on stdout in json mode + the resolver not-found prose + claim_core's 'cannot claim' stderr + CLAIMED text/json. Routed claim in-process in rebar._cli (_LIFECYCLE). Rewired rebar.claim library off _run -> claim_compute. Parity test test_e3_claim.py: 7 scenarios GREEN (usage, not-found text+json, --assignee missing-value, bad --output, claim success text/json +/- assignee, already-claimed exit-10 text+json). Concurrency matrix (-m integration, incl. claim storm exercising rewired rebar.claim): 4 passed. WRITE-PATH TRIO (transition/reopen/claim) touching the exit-10 optimistic-concurrency contract now in-process + validated. REMAINING in E3: compact/compact-all, scratch, delete.
